analysis.name: Mask Network
analysis.summary: MASK在XRPL DEX上交易，流动性极低（$13），24h涨幅1.71%但成交量仅3.13 XRP，无实际交易意义。基本面有Lens Protocol接管等利好，但价格已从ATH跌99%，近期持续下跌。不推荐买入。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性改善至$10k以上且出现真实成交量

catalysts: 2026年1月接管Lens Protocol，扩展社交协议版图

latestNews.title: Aave Transfers Lens Social Protocol Control to Mask Network
latestNews.reason: Mask Network获得Lens Protocol控制权，增强其在去中心化社交领域的影响力

latestNews.title: Mask Network takes over Lens Protocol with goal to build 'products people actually use'
latestNews.reason: 接管Lens Protocol，表明Mask Network在社交协议上的战略布局

fundamentals: Mask Network旨在连接Web2.0和Web3.0，提供加密消息、去中心化支付和文件存储
总供应量1亿枚，已全部流通，无通胀压力
市值约3832万美元（CEX数据），但XRPL上市值仅5.47万美元
marketRead: XRPL DEX上MASK/XRP交易对流动性仅$13.19，24h成交量3.13 XRP，几乎无实际交易
价格24h涨1.71%但无意义，因流动性极低，任何小额交易即可大幅拉盘或砸盘
CEX上MASK价格$0.383，24h跌2.28%，7日跌8%，30日跌12%，呈下行趋势
risks: XRPL DEX流动性极低，存在滑点和操纵风险
价格从历史高点下跌99%，市场情绪悲观
新闻利好（Lens接管）发生在1月，已过时，未对价格产生持续影响
项目活跃度低，近期无重大更新或催化剂
watchlist: CEX上MASK价格是否企稳或放量上涨
Lens Protocol整合进展及用户增长数据
XRPL DEX流动性是否增加至有意义的水平
sourceNotes: XRPL DEX数据来自DexScreener，流动性极低，价格不可靠
新闻来源为Google News，部分为旧闻
CEX数据来自CoinGecko，但未提供具体交易所

profile.name: Mask Network
profile.description: Mask Network is the core product of Dimension, which is positioned to become the bridge that connects internet users from Web 2.0 to Web 3.0. The foundational technology of Mask Network is a peer-to-peer encrypted messaging application, with new functions continuously being created around this foundation. We at Mask Network are strong believers in the ownership economy. People should own what they produce, people should own their data, their attention and the virtual space they choose to contribute to. Mask Network integrates decentralized social messaging, borderless payment network, and decentralized file storage and sharing to provide a safe and convenient portal for users to jump right into the continent of decentralized finance and then the new world of Web 3.0.
